weekly_summary: Over the past two days, our security landscape has been characterized by a total of 9 findings, with 5 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-27750, CVE-2026-27749, CVE-2026-2599, CVE-2026-30791, and CVE-2026-3598, each observed once. The most active day was March 5, 2026, with threats spanning multiple security domains, including AI and ML threats, containers and Kubernetes, crypto libraries, OS and kernel, supply chain, and web and servers, indicating a diverse and complex threat environment that warrants continued monitoring and vigilance.
